title: Samsung Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 leak teases thinner, brighter flagship smartwatch - Engadget
summary: Samsung is expected to announce the Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 on Wednesday. We got a first look at the Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 design earlier this month thanks to Android Headlines , but Leakmail's post includes new perspectives and specs.
